section_title: A contract is not voidable because it was caused by a mistake as to any
content:
21. A contract is not voidable because it was caused by a mistake as to any
mistakes as
law in force in Bangladesh; but a mistake as to a law not in force in
to law
Bangladesh has the same effect as a mistake of fact.
4[* * *]
Illustration
A and B make a contract grounded on the erroneous belief that a particular
debt is barred by the Bangladesh Law of Limitation: the contract is not
voidable.
Contract
illustrations:

debt is barred by the Bangladesh Law of Limitation: the contract is not
